source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 台风来袭 全场景防御指南请收好
topics.official_english: Typhoon Approaching: Comprehensive Defense Guide Released
topics.why_hot: Typhoon season is active, and the public urgently needs safety information.
topics.share_angle: Explain the science behind typhoons and practical safety tips for different scenarios.

topics.chinese_topic: 河南部分西瓜价格跌至1毛多一斤
topics.official_english: Watermelon Prices in Henan Drop to Below 0.1 Yuan per Jin
topics.why_hot: Extremely low prices reflect agricultural market fluctuations and farmer distress.
topics.share_angle: Discuss factors behind price collapse and impact on farmers and consumers.

topics.chinese_topic: 教育部：坚决杜绝用手机布置作业
topics.official_english: Ministry of Education: Firmly Prohibit Assigning Homework via Mobile Phones
topics.why_hot: Education policy directly affects students and parents, sparking debate on screen time.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the rationale, challenges, and potential effects on students' digital habits.

topics.official_english: Regular High Schools to Expand Enrollment Over Next Five Years
topics.why_hot: Major education reform affecting millions of families and the vocational track.
topics.share_angle: Explain the policy shift and its implications for students and the education system.

topics.chinese_topic: 刷新年内最大降幅！今晚油价下调
topics.official_english: Record Fuel Price Cut This Year: Oil Prices to Drop Tonight
topics.why_hot: Fuel prices directly impact daily commuting and logistics costs.
topics.share_angle: Break down the reasons for the price cut and its economic ripple effects.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国男篮73比92不敌日本男篮
topics.official_english: China Men's Basketball Loses 73-92 to Japan
topics.why_hot: Loss to regional rival sparks discussion on team performance and development.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the game and broader trends in Asian basketball competitiveness.

topics.chinese_topic: LV老花被指模仿中国唐代宝相花
topics.official_english: LV Monogram Allegedly Copies Tang Dynasty Baoxiang Flower Pattern
topics.why_hot: Cultural appropriation debate between a global luxury brand and Chinese heritage.
topics.share_angle: Explore the historical pattern and the controversy over intellectual property.

topics.chinese_topic: 试验列车撞人致11死2伤 调查报告公布
topics.official_english: Investigation Report Released on Test Train Accident That Killed 11 and Injured 2
topics.why_hot: Major safety incident with public concern over railway safety and accountability.
topics.share_angle: Summarize key findings and discuss implications for rail safety protocols.
